description_long: This object consists of a dark, faceted bowl filled with a light green liquid, placed on a striped cloth atop a square wooden tray. The bowl has a slightly irregular, hand-crafted appearance with a matte finish and a thick rim. The tray is broad, flat, and has a rich brown color, providing a stable base for the bowl and cloth. A slender, light-colored stick or utensil rests on the tray beside the bowl, suggesting a serving or ceremonial function. The striped cloth beneath the bowl is white with blue lines, adding a touch of visual contrast and softness to the arrangement. The overall design is simple yet elegant, suitable for serving beverages or food in a refined urban setting such as a café, tea house, or outdoor event.
description: A dark, faceted bowl with light green liquid sits on a striped cloth atop a square wooden tray, accompanied by a slender utensil. The arrangement is simple, elegant, and visually balanced.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bowl, green liquid, striped cloth, and a slender utensil on the left side of the tray.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view with the bowl centered, the utensil less visible, and the striped cloth more prominent.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the utensil now on the right, bowl and cloth clearly visible, and tray edges well defined.
description_view_3: Rear view with the bowl, striped cloth, and tray visible; the utensil is mostly hidden behind the bowl.
attribute_rim_design: The bowl has a thick, slightly irregular, faceted rim that is raised and rounded, with no additional decorative elements or grooves. The tray has a flat, squared edge with minimal height.
attribute_decorative_patterns: The only visible decorative pattern is the blue and white stripes on the cloth beneath the bowl. No other motifs or embellishments are present.
attribute_reflective_properties: The surfaces appear mostly matte with minimal reflectivity, especially on the bowl and tray. There are no strong highlights or glare, and the cloth and utensil are also non-reflective.
